info.title: COLD START
info.author: etonedemid
info.details: COLD START is a top-down action shooter built in C++ with SDL2 for PC and Nintendo Switch homebrew. It combines fast combat, local content editing, multiplayer support, and a lightweight modding pipeline aimed at rapid iteration.

changelog:
v1.0.5
- Dedicated server: game start now works
- Dedicated server: waves now spawn
- CI: README version auto-sync

v1.0.4
- Linux bundle: stop bundling glibc (fixes SIGSEGV on newer systems)

v1.0.3
- Version string sync; Linux bundle permission fix

v1.0.2
- Parry kills sync over network; robust spawn fallback

v1.0.1
- See README.md for earlier history
